title: Reviews Cross-Journal Editorial Team
gist: This is a Springer Nature staff-directory page listing the fifteen-plus editors of the Nature Reviews Cross-Journal Editorial Team and their bios. It carries no technology research, market data, or investable signal; the only mildly notable fact is the scale of Nature's Research Briefing publishing program.

insights.claim: Springer Nature's Reviews Cross-Journal Editorial Team published 2,500 Research Briefings across 35 research journals by the end of 2025, having pioneered the Research Briefing article type in 2022.
insights.speaker: Nature Energy
insights.so_what: Indicates the scale of Springer Nature's editorial content operation; only marginally relevant as background on the academic-publishing business, not an actionable signal.
insights.quote: with 2,500 Research Briefings published over 35 research journals by the end of 2025
